title: MistaThing's Groovy Music Discs
description: Retextures every disc in the game, giving each of them a more unique look.
body:
**Tired of every disc looking the same and boring? Enhance your Minecraft world with MistaThings Groovy Discs! This texture pack retextures all music discs up to 1.21!, giving each one a unique look!**

Here is a preview of every texture changed in the game
![big disc preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8e161e6a3cf185bafef1d0e2caf151c11683cd20.png)

A explination for all of the discs

- 13 - Added slight cracks.
- Cat - Cat is a more iconic and nostalgic song, so I made it resemble a grass block with grass in the center and brown resembling dirt.
- Blocks - Gave Blocks a blocky center.
- Chirp - Gave the disc a redder color.
- Far - Made the center the smallest to look like it's far from the edges of the disc.
- Mall - Gave it a purple color as well as a purple side.
- Mellohi - Gave it a darker purple disc as well as a purple side; the shininess is supposed to resemble the white in the center of the disc.
- Stal - Since Stal has a black center, I gave it a white disc to look cooler.
- Strad - The opposite of Stal; gave it a darker disc.
- Ward - Gave it a greener disc and a colored side that uses both colors from the center.
- 11 - Gave 11 a white center to show the mysteriousness of the disc and made the center very dark red.
- Wait - My favorite retexture. It was my favorite classic disc.
- Otherside - Made the disc colors both blue and green to give it a "yin and yang" sort of look.
- 5 - Made the disc and fragment look like they were made out of skulk.
- Pigstep - Made the center look more golden and shiny.
- Relic - Gave it a more diamond-like center.
- Both Creator Discs - Gave them a tuff center as the yellow one looked too ugly.
- Precipice - Made the center resemble the Breeze since they're both found at the same structure.
